entities.name: KRISHNA RIVER BASIN
entities.description: A river basin in India frequently affected by drought due to climate change

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: An abiotic stress characterized by water scarcity and failure of monsoon

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: A driver contributing to the occurrence of drought in the Krishna River Basin

entities.name: NAGARJUNA SAGAR
entities.description: A major dam and project area located within the Krishna River Basin

entities.name: WATER IMBALANCE
entities.description: A primary cause of drought conditions

entities.name: FAILURE OF MONSOON
entities.description: A primary cause of drought conditions

entities.name: LULC
entities.description: Land use/land cover classification used to map irrigated areas and assess drought

entities.name: IRRIGATED AREAS
entities.description: Agricultural lands receiving irrigation, used to measure drought impact on food security

entities.name: MODIS
entities.description: Satellite data used for time series analysis and LULC mapping

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Technology used for assessing abiotic stress and cropland changes

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stressors including drought and water scarcity

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: A specific type of abiotic stress affecting cropland

entities.name: SPECTRAL MATCHING TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A technique used for the identification of LULC areas

entities.name: NDVI
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index used to categorize drought severity

entities.name: GROUND SURVEY
entities.description: Field data collection used to validate the accuracy of spatial products

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The availability and access to food, impacted by changes in irrigated areas during drought

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the Krishna River Basin is located
